name: Tiny Army
description: The "Mini Reds" are the bad guys and are trying to capture your most strategic militar base. You must stop them with your "Tiny Blues" troops. Be smart in your tacticals and choose the right units to beat the ennemy. Lead the "Tiny Blues" army and defeat the "Mini Reds" !
